title: I am safe and steady with money today
subtitle: A three-minute release-and-allow for the day's accumulated money tightness.
excerpt: A short pair of energy statements that closes the day's accumulated money tightness and brings the body back to steady. Use after a hard money conversation, a stressful banking check, or before a money decision that has been pulling at the day.
sourceNotes: Release / Allow structure: The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024), chapters 2 through 5. Theme adapted from Day 1 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Calm daily money panic".

practice.whenToUse: Use after a hard money conversation, a stressful banking check, or as a daytime reset before a money decision that has been pulling at the day.

content.text: A three-minute pair of energy statements that closes the day's accumulated money tightness. Use it on its own, or as a closing after a tapping round, or before a money decision the body has been bracing against.

attrs.quote: I am ready to release the tightness around money I have been holding today. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow safe, steady ease with money today. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

content.text: Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
If the tightness in the chest is too loud for the Allow to land, tap first.
covers the morning version. For a weekly reset, use

The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024), chapters 2 through 5. The theme (calming daily money tightness as a short reset) is adapted from Day 1 of MONEY (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The combination as a midday reset is original to the homemade.education library.
